daily_don_question_data.question: According to Algonquian folklore, how does one transform into a Wendigo?
answers: Drinking the blood of many slain animals.

daily_question.question: In 2008, British celebrity chef Gordon Ramsay believes he almost died after suffering what accident in Iceland while filming?
answers: Crash landing when arriving at Keflavík airport
A minor car accident in a snowstorm
Being served under-cooked chicken at his hotel
Slipping off a cliff, and nearly drowning in icy water
daily_question.correct: Slipping off a cliff, and nearly drowning in icy water
